title: praealstonia parvifolia
intro: Praealstonia parvifolia, a plant species in the family Rutaceae, is native to tropical regions and is also known as the 'Small-leaved Praealstonia'. The medicinal properties of Praealstonia parvifolia include its use in traditional medicine for treating various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and rheumatism. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which contribute to its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Praealstonia parvifolia can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used in herbal medicine for treating respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
